case_title: EPIFANIO CARIAGA BAUTISTA VS. ASTORIA METAL CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAUTISTA, EPIFANIO CARIAGA AS TO DEFENDANT ASTORIA METAL CORPORATION WATSON, DOUGLAS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAUTISTA, EPIFANIO CARIAGA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASTORIA METAL CORPORATION WATSON, DOUGLAS $11,915.72 PRINCIPAL, $128.32 INTEREST, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,155.04, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
